metric_caveats: ReAct tool observations are diagnostic; gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 scoring is unchanged.
This variant uses dspy.ReAct (tool loop + ChainOfThought extract), not provider JSON schema.
Track react_tool_call_count and react_trajectory in prediction metadata for latency/cost analysis.
Compare against temporal-candidates v1.1 (`…232514Z`) and event-table B2 (`…235058Z`) on the same slice.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing on this slice only.
Do not extrapolate slice metrics to full-validation performance.
This is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
